message:
feat(mysql): add prepared statement metadata storage to connection

Adds infrastructure for MySQL prepared statement (binary protocol)
support:

1. PreparedStmtMeta struct: Stores server-assigned statement ID,
   parameter column definitions, and result column definitions needed
   for type-safe binary encoding/decoding

2. prepared_stmts HashMap in MySqlAsyncConnection: Tracks active
   prepared statements by their server ID

3. Imports the prepared protocol module for future use

This prepares for implementing prepare()/execute() methods that use
the MySQL binary protocol instead of text protocol, enabling:
- Parameterized queries without SQL injection risk
- More efficient repeated query execution
- Type-safe binary data transfer

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
